title: System Health Diagnostics
objective: Run bounded cross-module diagnostics to explain stale data, queue lag, dependency drift, or repeated failures.

steps.description: Classify whether the issue is data freshness, permissions, queueing, content dependency, or module-specific drift.
Execute only the relevant module diagnostics and cached snapshot checks for the identified surface.
Overlay reviewed failure patterns and prior successful resolutions from the dynamic context layer.
Produce bounded remediation options or handoff guidance.

escalation_rules: Prefer cached summaries and aggregated diagnostics over full dataset scans.
Escalate to the module-specific playbook when a single surface clearly owns the problem.
